basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Kalyani Pradhan Mantri Arogya Mitra Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani) Pradhan Mantri Arogya Mitra Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Kalyani. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Kalyani Pradhan Mantri Arogya Mitra Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: PRADHAN MANTRI AROGYA MITRA (PMAM): Essential: Passed 10+2 from a recognized Board/Institution, Basic computer proficiency, Knowledge of MS Office and internet usage, Ability to communicate in Bengali/Hindi/English. Desirable: Graduate from recognized University, PMAM Certification/Training, Experience in hospital registration/insurance/AB-PMJAY/ABHA operations.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Screening Test (if large number of applications) Document Verification Merit List

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Pradhan Mantri Arogya Mitra (PMAM) post at AIIMS Kalyani is scheduled for 25th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Pradhan Mantri Arogya Mitra (PMAM) post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Pradhan Mantri Arogya Mitra (PMAM) position at AIIMS Kalyani as per the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the PMAM post?
faq.answer: The essential educational qualification is passing 10+2 from a recognized board. Basic computer proficiency and communication skills in Bengali, Hindi, or English are also required. A graduate degree and PMAM certification are desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Pradhan Mantri Arogya Mitra (PMAM) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Pradhan Mantri Arogya Mitra (PMAM) post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the PMAM position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Pradhan Mantri Arogya Mitra (PMAM) post will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Kalyani PMAM recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a walk-in interview. A screening test may be conducted if there is a large number of applicants, followed by document verification and the creation of a merit list.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the venue for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani, Kalyani, West Bengal, 741245. Candidates should report at the specified venue.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Pradhan Mantri Arogya Mitra (PMAM) post is contract-based, as indicated in the recruitment details.
